title: HTTPie Response
description: Schema representing an HTTPie HTTP response, including status, headers, and body.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code of the response.

statusText.description: The HTTP status text accompanying the status code.

httpVersion.description: The HTTP version used in the response.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the response body.

elapsed.description: Time elapsed for the request-response cycle in seconds.

encoding.description: The character encoding of the response body.
